text: Raider is down but still on comms. Breathing: yes. Pride: complicated.
Using the backpack as a pillow while waiting for consequences to finish loading.
Downed near the LZ. The shuttle timer is still running, which is either hope or paperwork with engines.
Comms reduced to breathing, static, and one very judgmental backpack buckle.
Raider requested a revive. System replied with a shrug-shaped silence. Feature backlog acknowledged.
